title: Russian Hill Neighborhood Guide - CrawlSF
content: + St. Patrick’s Day Pub Crawl. Upcoming San Francisco St. Patrick's Day Pub Crawl. Upcoming San Francisco Independence Day Pub Crawl. Upcoming San Francisco Halloween Pub Crawl. 1233 Polk Street San Francisco, CA 94123 , Maye's Oyster House. Bars with Great Food in San Francisco. Russian Hill San Francisco Lombard Street. # Russian Hill & Polk Village. Russian Hill is located on one of San Francisco’s iconic 43 hills. Known for its steep streets, historic architecture and amazing views of the Bay, Russian Hill offers an unforgettable experience for anyone looking to grab a bite to eat, enjoy a drink at a bar or just cruise around on a lazy Sunday. Russian Hill is home of Lombard Street, known as “the crookedest street in the world”. It is one of the best nightlife destinations in the city. Russian Hill is one of the oldest neighborhoods in the city. Some of San Francisco’s oldest homes are located in this part of Russian Hill.
